site.title: Health & Home Essentials | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Custom health, wellness & handy home promo items including fitness gear, blankets & kitchen gifts. Practical branded products that make great gifts.

hero.title: Health & Home
hero.imageAlt: Custom branded health, wellness, and home lifestyle promo items

centreText.title: Everyday Comfort, On Brand
centreText.description: The best promo items don't feel like promo items at all. They feel useful, appreciated & easy to keep.

featureImage.imageAlt: Custom branded health and home lifestyle products

features.title: Health & Wellness Essentials
features.description:
Wellness products that work for you! Health-focused promo items are trending hard right now, especially practical, everyday wellness products that support real routines.

  • Fitness bands & resistance bands
  • First aid kits & bandage cases
  • Hand sanitizer & wellness kits
  • Stress balls
  • Yoga mats & light fitness gear

Wellness items show your brand cares, and they stay in use.

features.title: Home Comfort & Lifestyle Items
features.description:
Home items are very popular for client and realtor gifting, as well as for your organization's branded holiday gifts. This is where promo gets powerful; items people use at home stick around longer and feel more luxurious.

  • Blankets & throws
  • Cutting boards & charcuterie boards
  • Coasters & drinkware
  • BBQ tools & kitchen sets

Pair your home comfort items with custom drinkware for a thoughtful gift package that feels practical, polished & easy to enjoy.

features.title: Lifestyle Extras
features.description:
Simple. Useful. Effective. We've been in the promo business a long time, and these practical items are always in demand.

  • Lip balm & personal care items
  • Travel kits & comfort items
  • Pet items, including collars, bandanas & bowls
  • Lunch containers
  • Candles & home fragrance items

Naturally, we included items popular with pet-lovers too. Get them branded or not — it's up to you.
